name: iMessage (macOS 12 Monterey)
description: iMessage channel plugin for macOS 12 Monterey using direct database polling

requirePrefixForAllowlist.description: Whether allowlisted senders need to use prefix

mediaMaxMb.description: Maximum media file size in MB

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often to check for new messages (default: 10000ms)

prefix.label: Command Prefix
prefix.help: Optional prefix required to trigger the bot

textChunkLimit.label: Text Chunk Limit
textChunkLimit.help: Maximum characters per message (iMessage has limits)
